title: just some songs?
summary: No. They mean the very essence of life to me. Those songs are what means to be alive in their own way. A girl brings out a rocky rock version of a beautiful rendition of late 17th century. Ani choying shows us the perspective of each environment. "Phool ko ankha ma phool nei sansara, Kada ko ankha ma kada sansara." A soul brought up in a harsh environment should be shown that the world is not full of thrones, there can be a path where flowers bloom. (edit): I wrote about other songs too... dont know where they got lost in this md to json conversion.

title: welp im officially lost
summary: Thought I had a direction but when I sat down couple of times and thought what is it that I want to do then I found myself totally lost. I dont even know where I am lost. I just see myself lost in a void? or is it a messh?

title: May 6: Hopeful for tommorow
summary: Some say that hope is poisoinous. Some say that when you are at your darkest, giving up on hope of any ray can push you to deepest despair. Who knows when light is gonna pop up? Atleast not in quantum world. Ours is more or less predictable to a degree, emphasis on to a degree. Sooooo Hopeful for tommorow? lesse what goes on in this misterios journey.
